hero.subtitle: For Sweet & Bakery Boxes. Premium food-grade packaging for Indian sweets, bakeries, and restaurants. Trusted by 2,000+ businesses across Central India and beyond.

products.title: Packaging for every occasion
products.subtitle: From traditional mithai boxes to modern bakery packaging, we have the perfect solution for your business

indianSweets.name: Indian Sweet Boxes
indianSweets.description: Elegant packaging for mithai, ladoos, barfi, and festive dry fruits. Food-grade certified with premium finishes.

cakeBakery.name: Cake & Bakery
cakeBakery.description: Sturdy boxes for cakes, pastries, cupcakes, and brownies. Clear windows and secure closures.

fastFood.name: Sandwich & Fast Food
fastFood.description: Functional packaging for burgers, sandwiches, fries, and combo meals. Designed for delivery.

services.title: End-to-end packaging solutions
services.subtitle: From initial concept to final delivery, we handle every aspect of your packaging needs

customDesign.title: Custom Design
customDesign.description: Work with our expert team to create packaging that perfectly represents your brand and protects your products.

festiveCollections.title: Festive Collections
festiveCollections.description: Special packaging designs for Diwali, weddings, and celebrations. Ready-made festive themes to make your sweets shine.

sustainableSolutions.title: Sustainable Solutions
sustainableSolutions.description: 100% recyclable and biodegradable options. Reduce your environmental footprint without compromising quality.

bulkOrders.title: Bulk Orders
bulkOrders.description: Large volume orders with consistent quality and competitive pricing. Reliable supply for your growing business.
